nasb.text: Then they will know that I am the Lord; I have not said in vain that I would inflict this disaster on them.” ’

esv.text: And they shall know that I am the Lord. I have not said in vain that I would do this evil to them.”

cnv.text: 他們必知道我是耶和華，我說要降這災禍在他們身上的話並不是空話。’”

ccb.text: 这样，他们就知道我是耶和华，我说要降灾祸给他们并非空话。’”
